basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bathinda Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: India Institute of Medical Sciences Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda)
basic_details.short_information: India Institute of Medical Sciences Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) Clinical Research Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 15-05-2026 on the official website aiimsbathinda.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bathinda Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have a Bachelor/Master’s in Life Sciences / M.Pharm. / Public Health and a Diploma/Degree in Clinical Research with minimum 6 months experience in clinical trials are eligible to apply for this Clinical Research Coordinator vacancy. The online application proc

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor/Master’s in Life Sciences / M.Pharm. / Public Health, Diploma/Degree in Clinical Research, Minimum 06 months experience in clinical trials
qualification.details: Bachelor/Master’s in Life Sciences / M.Pharm. / Public Health Diploma/Degree in Clinical Research Minimum 06 months experience in clinical trials

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bathinda to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Clinical Research Coordinator post at AIIMS Bathinda?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Clinical Research Coordinator position at AIIMS Bathinda is 20th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Clinical Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Bachelor/Master’s degree in Life Sciences / M.Pharm. / Public Health, along with a Diploma/Degree in Clinical Research and at least 6 months of experience in clinical trials.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Clinical Research Coordinator post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Clinical Research Coordinator post announced by AIIMS Bathinda.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Clinical Research Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written examination followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for the AIIMS Bathinda Clinical Research Coordinator job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official AIIMS Bathinda website.

faq.question: Q9. When is the walk-in interview scheduled for this position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 21st May 2026, between 09:00 AM and 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AIIMS Bathinda?
faq.answer: The official website of India Institute of Medical Sciences Bathinda is www.aiimsbathinda.edu.in.
